metadata.title: Produce a product requirement artifact for SR8 v2.

mission.primary_objective: Produce a product requirement artifact for SR8 v2.
mission.success_definition: Stakeholders approve requirement scope.; Completion rate improves after rollout compared with current baseline.

in_scope.item: Define user and stakeholder signals for onboarding flow.
Define acceptance criteria for first-session completion.
Define milestone slices for delivery planning.
Capture measurable success criteria for release readiness.

out_of_scope.item: No implementation coding in this phase.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Completion rate improves after rollout compared with current baseline.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.problem_statement: Produce a product requirement artifact for SR8 v2.

objectives.item: Produce a product requirement artifact for SR8 v2.

requirements.item: Define user and stakeholder signals for onboarding flow.
Define acceptance criteria for first-session completion.
Define milestone slices for delivery planning.
Capture measurable success criteria for release readiness.

acceptance_criteria.item: Completion rate improves after rollout compared with current baseline.

implementation_plan.item: Define user and stakeholder signals for onboarding flow.
Define acceptance criteria for first-session completion.
Define milestone slices for delivery planning.
Capture measurable success criteria for release readiness.

validation_plan.item: PRD artifact for planning and implementation handoff.
Markdown PRD derivative for cross-functional review.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
